ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "overtime_losses" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "points_percentage" REAL /* Points percentage */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals for */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals against */,
  "strength_rating" REAL /* Strength rating */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of schedule */,
  "real_points_percentage" REAL /* Real points percentage */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Number of regulation/overtime wins */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points per game */,
  "goals_per_game" REAL /* Average goals per game */,
  "shots_per_game" REAL /* Average shots per game */,
  "shots_against_per_game" REAL /* Average shots against per game */,
  "penalty_minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average penalty minutes per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the division belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the commissioner of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "rank_division" INTEGER /* Rank within the division */,
  "rank_conference" INTEGER /* Rank within the conference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "games_behind" INTEGER /* Number of games behind the leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES team_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "rank_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rank in the league */,
  "rank_division" INTEGER /* Rank within the division */,
  "rank_conference" INTEGER /* Rank within the conference */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
